system.description:
Profile Analysis is the Investigator discipline for runners who came up in behavioral science divisions, corporate insider-threat teams, or the quieter rooms of the law enforcement world. They study the patterns of a single individual until they can predict the next twenty minutes of that individual's life: which door they will use, which lie they are about to tell, which subordinate they will text under pressure.

On the job, the Profile Analyst is the runner who can answer the question the rest of the team forgot to ask. Their entry feature is Read the Subject: after observing or studying a target for at least ten minutes, the Investigator gains insight into one of the target's current motivations, weaknesses, or near-term intentions, as adjudicated by the table.
system.grants: Read the Subject: after 10 minutes of study, learn one of a target's motivations, weaknesses, or intentions.

wizard.tagline: Read the person until the next move is already known
